contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 360
- Description: *OpenClaw × Cursor — daily state of the DAO (not a manual post from Gary)*
  
  - The static site now has solid whitepaper handbooks (DAO + Agroverse + SunMint) with real diagrams, clearer layout, and links that behave the same in local dev and production. CTAs say *View Whitepaper* so people know what they are opening.
  - Hit List and field-agent work kept moving: Places on a schedule, Shortlisted→enrich flow, pipeline charts, and safer Sheet/CI behavior—less babysitting for outreach ops.
  - DApp and tokenomics tightened the sales / QR / Stripe / USPS path; stores nearby can save field-agent location for the sheet. Shop merged homepage, checkout, and inventory-related improvements in the same window.
  
  Details + links in the next message.
  
  *Shipped*
  
  - *truesight_me_beta:* whitepapers + site — https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/9 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/10 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/11 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/12 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/13 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/14 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/15 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/16

  - *agentic_ai_context:* https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/13
  - *tokenomics:* https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/214 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/215 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/216 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/217
  - *dapp:* https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/148 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/149 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/150
  - *agroverse_shop_beta:* https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/64 (homepage / nav / hero / CTAs; #55–#63 also merged this week)
  - *Community (Telegram log):* Edgar shows recent contribution, inventory, sales, and QR + Stripe/USPS activity on Oscar QR 2024OSCAR_20260330_38; compilation sheet https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1qbZZhf-_7xzmDTriaJVWj6OZshyQsFkdsAV8-pyzASQ/edit
